news.title: US stocks rally, oil prices fall as Trump calls off fresh Iran strikes
news.summary: Wall Street stocks rallied and oil prices tumbled Thursday after President Donald Trump pulled back from renewed US strikes on Iran while European equities edged higher after the ECB raised interest rates.Earlier, the European Central Bank, as widely expected, raised interest rates for the first time since 2023 after the Iran war sent oil and gas prices soaring as the Strait of Hormuz was cut off to Gulf tanker traffic.

news.title: Tesla Stock Needs the SpaceX IPO to Happen Already
news.summary: Tesla  stock rose Thursday after the order book for SpaceX’s massive initial public offering closed.  Tesla stock jumped 4.6% to $399.15 on Thursday, while the  and  added 1.7% and 1.9%, respectively.  Coming into Thursday trading, shares were down almost 10% over the past week, leaving investors wondering if Tesla investors were selling stock to fund purchases of SpaceX shares, which are expected to begin trading on Friday.

news.title: How major US stock indexes fared Thursday 6/11/2026
news.summary: U.S. stocks rallied to their best day in two months, and oil prices fell after President Donald Trump called off his threat to bomb Iran in the evening.  The Dow Jones Industrial Average leaped 1.9%, and the Nasdaq composite rallied 2.5%.  The Nasdaq composite rose 640.16 points, or 2.5%, to 25,809.66.

news.title: Vistra’s Helix Partnership Links AI Power Demand To Future Earnings Mix
news.summary: Vistra (NYSE:VST) is partnering with KKR, NVIDIA, and Kuwait Investment Authority to launch Helix Digital Infrastructure. Helix is being set up to serve next generation AI data center infrastructure with more than $10 billion in long term capital commitments. The partnership positions Vistra as a preferred power provider for large scale AI data center clients. For readers tracking Vistra at a share price of $138.54, this move adds a fresh layer to the story beyond recent stock performance...

news.title: Elon Musk Is (Still) a Trillionaire
